title: Harvey & Mason 8 Musical Christmas Crackers: Jingle Bells, Festive Fun, Music, Family Game, Novelty Xmas
features: WHAT'S INCLUDED: The box includes 8 Musical Christmas Crackers. Each cracker includes a hat, motto and snap and a bell.

CHRISTMAS CRACKERS: Jingle bells, jingle bells, jingle all the way! Could you imagine a Christmas without a 'Jingle Bells' tune? With these super-fun Musical Christmas Crackers, you can play it with your family and friends!

INSTRUCTIONS: Nominate a person to be the 'conductor' and read out the numbers. Using the numbered bells provided in each cracker, each player rings their bell following the numbers in the sequence below, to play out the tunes. Create your own mini-orchestra with your loved ones, these crackers mean festive fun for all the family!

FESTIVE, ELEGANT DESIGN: The crackers feature two charming designs: one with red stripes and "Jingle Bells," and the other with a delicate holly pattern on a white background. Each cracker is elegantly tied with a red ribbon.
description: Product Description MUSIC: Fun for all the family! Create your very own mini orchestra with fun Christmas and everyday tunes. Contains 8 kazoos so all the family can join in. WHAT'S INCLUDED: This set of festive crackers includes 8 whistles and a music sheet. Each cracker also contains a classic hat and motto. DESIGN: These fun crackers feature a festive star design in red and white, each with a different classic Christmas lyric. A great addition to your dinner table this Christmas. WHAT'S INCLUDED: The box includes 8 Musical Christmas Crackers. Each cracker includes a hat, motto and snap and a bell. CHRISTMAS CRACKERS: Jingle bells, jingle bells, jingle all the way! Could you imagine a Christmas without a 'Jingle Bells' tune? With these super-fun Musical Christmas Crackers, you can play it with your family and friends! Using the numbered bells provided in each cracker, each player rings their bell following the numbers in the sequence below, to play out the tunes. FESTIVE, ELEGANT DESIGN: The crackers feature two charming designs: one with red stripes and "Jingle Bells," and the other with a delicate holly pattern on a white background. Each cracker is elegantly tied with a red ribbon. WHAT'S INCLUDED: A box includes 6 Santa kazoo-themed crackers. Each cracker contains a Kazoo, instruction sheet, hats, snaps and motto. KAZOO: Festive house of tunes! Fun for the whole family. Musical guessing game with 6 individual Kazoos. Whether you want to guess the tune or just play the kazoo, these kazoo Christmas crackers are perfect for the whole family. If you can hum, you can Kazoo! NUTCRACKER & BALLERINA: Featuring enchanting Nutcracker and ballerina designs, illustrated on elegant paper with festive red and white details. The perfect touch of Christmas spirit for your table. FUN FOR ALL THE FAMILY: Each cracker contains a kazoo, hat, motto, and a snap. Perfect Musical game to play around the Christmas table. WHAT'S INCLUDED: A box includes 8 red and white Santa themed crackers. Each cracker contains a musical whistle, instruction sheet, hats, snaps, and motto. KAZOO: Festive house of tunes! Fun for the whole family. Musical guessing game with 8 individual whistles. Each Whistle makes a different sound allowing you to recreate Christmas most popular tunes. GINGERBREAD: Featuring red and white crackers inspired by Santa himself. The perfect touch of Christmas spirit to your table. FUN FOR ALL THE FAMILY: Each cracker whistle hat, motto, and a snap. Perfect Musical game to play around the Christmas table. KAZOO: Get ready for a festive house of tunes! These kazoo-themed crackers offer a fun musical guessing game for the whole family. With 6 individual kazoos, you can either guess the tune or simply play along—if you can hum, you can kazoo! Pyramid Kazoo Crackers WHAT'S INCLUDED: The box contains 6 pyramid-shaped, kazoo-themed Christmas crackers. Each cracker includes a kazoo, an instruction sheet, a hat, a snap, and a motto. PYRAMID: Add a unique twist to your Christmas celebration with these pyramid-shaped crackers. Featuring bold, festive colours and a triangular design, they’ll bring a delightful charm to your holiday table.
